mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM( (hist.price - cur.price) * COALESCE(cur.quantity_entry, cur.quantity_real) ), 0) FROM erp_purchase_order_item cur JOIN erp_purchase_order cur_o ON cur_o.order_sn = cur.order_sn LEFT JOIN ( SELECT i2.sku, i2.price, o2.opt_realname, o2.lx_create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY i2.sku ORDER BY o2.lx_create_time DESC) AS rn FROM erp_purchase_order_item i2 JOIN erp_purchase_order o2 ON o2.order_sn = i2.order_sn WHERE i2.order_sn != #{orderSn} ) hist ON hist.sku = cur.sku AND hist.opt_realname = cur_o.opt_realname AND hist.lx_create_time < cur_o.lx_create_time AND hist.rn = 1 WHERE cur.order_sn = #{orderSn} AND (cur.item_status IS NULL OR cur.item_status != 2)
